[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000100 1
1 001011010 4
2 001001001 3
3 110100001 4
4 000001100 2
5 001110011 5
6 100011110 5
7 101110101 6

34 43 000000101 2
45 54 000000000 a
56 65 001001000 2
67 76 000000001 1
70 07 000000000 a

13 31 001110001 4
